title: Editing Policy
description: An exact policy system with a visible permission rule and a read-only conflict.

tokens.label: Administrator
tokens.description: The observation that the account is an administrator.

tokens.label: Always-present token
tokens.description: The distinguished token present in every state.

tokens.label: May edit
tokens.description: The observation that the policy permits editing.

tokens.label: Read only
tokens.description: The observation that the policy forbids editing.
